args.query: SELECT Id, WhatId, Subject, Status, Priority, ActivityDate, Description, OwnerId FROM Task WHERE TRIM(REPLACE(WhatId,'#','')) = '006Wt000007BGGjIAO' ORDER BY ActivityDate DESC, Id DESC LIMIT 200;

args.query: SELECT Id, OpportunityId, AccountId, ContactId, Name, Description, Status, CreatedDate, ExpirationDate FROM Quote WHERE TRIM(REPLACE(OpportunityId,'#','')) = '006Wt000007BGGjIAO' ORDER BY CreatedDate DESC LIMIT 50;

args.query: SELECT oli.Id, oli.OpportunityId, oli.Product2Id, oli.Quantity, oli.TotalPrice FROM OpportunityLineItem oli WHERE TRIM(REPLACE(oli.OpportunityId,'#','')) = '006Wt000007BGGjIAO' LIMIT 200;

args.query: SELECT c.Id, c.Status, c.StartDate, c.CustomerSignedDate, c.CompanySignedDate, c.Description, c.ContractTerm FROM Contract c WHERE TRIM(REPLACE(c.Id,'#','')) IN (SELECT TRIM(REPLACE(ContractID__c,'#','')) FROM Opportunity WHERE TRIM(REPLACE(Id,'#',''))='006Wt000007BGGjIAO') LIMIT 5;

exec_args.sql: SELECT c.Id, c.Status, c.StartDate, c.CustomerSignedDate, c.CompanySignedDate, c.Description, c.ContractTerm FROM Contract c WHERE TRIM(REPLACE(c.Id,'#','')) IN (SELECT TRIM(REPLACE(ContractID__c,'#','')) FROM Opportunity WHERE TRIM(REPLACE(Id,'#',''))='006Wt000007BGGjIAO') LIMIT 5;
